'''zhabuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:febricant|febricant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:febricant|febricant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhabuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæbihith|zhæbihith]] || [[word:zhæbihij|zhæbihij]] || [[word:zhæbihish|zhæbihish]] || [[word:zhæbihi|zhæbihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabubuhuth|zhabubuhuth]] || [[word:zhabubuhuj|zhabubuhuj]] || [[word:zhabubuhush|zhabubuhush]] || [[word:zhabubuhu|zhabubuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabuhuth|zhabuhuth]] || [[word:zhabuhuj|zhabuhuj]] || [[word:zhabuhush|zhabuhush]] || [[word:zhabuhu|zhabuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabufhuth|zhabufhuth]] || [[word:zhabufhuj|zhabufhuj]] || [[word:zhabufhush|zhabufhush]] || [[word:zhabufhuf|zhabufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhabuhuthu|zhabuhuthu]] || [[word:zhabuhuju|zhabuhuju]] || [[word:zhabuhushu|zhabuhushu]] || [[word:zhabuhuku|zhabuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhabuhuth|zhabuhuth]] || [[word:zhabuhuj|zhabuhuj]] || [[word:zhabuhush|zhabuhush]] || [[word:zhabuhu|zhabuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhabuhuthul|zhabuhuthul]] || [[word:zhabuhujul|zhabuhujul]] || [[word:zhabuhushul|zhabuhushul]] || [[word:zhabuhukul|zhabuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhabuhuthuthu|zhabuhuthuthu]] || [[word:zhabuhujuju|zhabuhujuju]] || [[word:zhabuhushushu|zhabuhushushu]] || [[word:zhabuhuku|zhabuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhabuhuthun|zhabuhuthun]] || [[word:zhabuhujun|zhabuhujun]] || [[word:zhabuhushun|zhabuhushun]] || [[word:zhabuhukun|zhabuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhabuhuthuoro|zhabuhuthuoro]] || [[word:zhabuhujuoro|zhabuhujuoro]] || [[word:zhabuhushuoro|zhabuhushuoro]] || [[word:zhabuhukuoro|zhabuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
